first_impression_why: A has a more refined, enterprise-grade visual presence with clean typography and confident positioning that signals a well-resourced team.
reasoning: A wins on visual refinement — the typography, spacing, and overall composition feel more polished and enterprise-ready. B has stronger visible traction metrics and a more immediately understandable product, but A's design execution is cleaner. Both are legitimate seed-stage sites; A just looks more like it has a designer on the team.
